name: Radley Ravencroft's Spy Web Mystery
short_description: Follow a murder investigation in this point & click 1920s murder mystery. Solve room escape style lock puzzles to unlock Radley's interviews with the suspects. Use your newfound information to draw connections between characters, and fill out a timeline of events.
detailed_description:
Radley Ravencroft's Spy Web Mystery is a point & click murder mystery set in a steampunk version of the American 1920s. Investigate digital recreations of the suspect's rooms in order to solve room escape style lock puzzles. These puzzles unlock video interviews with the suspects, which unlock event markers on your timeline. Draw connections between characters on your link board to unlock more investigations, and piece together the timeline of events for the day of the murder to solve the crime.

The game currently contains:

- 10 fully playable levels with non-linear gameplay (one per character profile)

- 25 FMV interviews with the suspects (green squares)

- 12 pieces of evidence the player can view from the hub (blue squares)

- All necessary event markers for the player to solve the timeline

- A link board with which the player can establish connections between the characters and unlock new investigations

- Flashy end credits containing a blooper reel
